title: Chapter 60
content:
Chapter 60

I was not expecting that. I was expecting her to lash out or just deny like she did yesterday, but I did not expect her to pull her small pink tongue out and give my dick head a lick.

There was another person who wasn't expecting that...

"Mother!" Zara's daughter, whose name I didn't know, stood up and declared her protest over such a filthy action done by Zara.

"That strange penetration is one thing, but this... this is demeaning!" Zara's daughter continued her protest, but as if she wasn't even there, Zara kept licking my dick.

Seeing her doing it, I said, "Could you please part your lips?"

She did exactly so without complaint, and I didn't see a reason why I shouldn't move in further. I pushed my dick deeper in her mouth, hoping it wouldn't clash with her teeth, but as if she was programmed to do so, like all the other women I had been with in this world, her teeth were far away, and her tongue knew the exact spot to lick.

The underside of my glans.

It was amazing, to say the least, and the sounds she emitted as she worked her mouth on my dick were amazing as well.

"Mmmm~~~"

She didn't have much strength to move, but she did as much as she could. Finally, she had succeeded in swallowing half of my penis and had even cleaned it, swallowing all the juices attached to it.

Unfortunately, the timer didn't wait for me to finish, and as always, it all stopped in the middle. It was a shitty feeling, no matter how many times I felt it.

As my dick returned to its usual abnormal state, Zara also managed to recover a bit.

"Are you done?" She asked, her voice mosquito-like like but there was clarity in her eyes, which meant she was regaining control of her body.

"Yes, Lady Zara," I replied.

"Good. Then you may leave for the day." She granted me an early leave, which was actually what I wanted. I thanked her and left, leaving her daughter, who clearly wasn't happy with what her mother had done at the end.

Well, who cared?

I was sure Zara would deal with it.

What I needed to deal with now was the lord. I could only hope that their plan, whoever 'they' were, was not underway.

~~

"Mother! Why did you do that? No matter how beneficial it is, to put his filthy penis in your mouth...!!!" Her daughter was angrier than usual, all her composure in the wind.

Zara, however, had no answer to her complaints. She didn't know why she had done that. It was just that...

"I don't know. It felt good." Zara replied vaguely.

"It felt good?" Her daughter asked.

"Yes. When he asked... ordered me to do something, I felt strangely good. I didn't know why, but I had an impulse to do as he wanted to." Zara explained in detail.

"Is it magic?" Now her daughter was worried.

"There is no such magic, and even if there was, it wouldn't work on me with me being a third circle mage and him being only the first circle," Zara argued about which was the most valid point. Her daughter couldn't deny that, but she also couldn't understand what other explanation there was for her mother to have done something like that. To someone inferior to her at that.

"Just stop thinking about it. Focus on how to poach him." Zara said as she sat up straight, but before she fixed her dress, she scooped the semen leaking out of her vagina with her fingers and put it in her mouth.

"Hmmm~~~" She savored the taste as if it were the greatest delicacy. Seeing her mother behaving like that, Zara's daughter couldn't help but ask, "Is it tasty?"

"I don't know. It has a unique taste to it. I can't tell, but I can say for sure it doesn't taste bad." Zara replied as she took another scoop.

Suddenly overcome with curiosity over her mother's tastes, Zara knelt between her mother's legs, and despite her aversion to putting her mouth at the place from which her mother urinated, she was more curious about what made her mother the way she was.

So as she had witnessed the boy earlier, she extended her pink tongue and licked the white substance leaking from her mother's vagina.

To her surprise, she found the taste to her liking. There was something salty mixed in as well that tasted somewhat fishy, but it wasn't the same taste as the white substance. But, aside from its taste, she couldn't find anything that could have made her mother act like that.

"Now, now. Enough inquisition. Leave now. This part is crucial." Zara said and dismissed her daughter, who was munching on her snack.

Once again curious about the crucial part, Zara's daughter wanted to know what it was, but she knew better than to question her mother, who could be very scary in a bad mood. With a reply, "Yes, mother," She left the room, leaving Zara behind, who closed her eyes and began to circulate her mana. Especially all the mana that had gathered on top of her abdomen.

~~

As expected, the two idiots were waiting for me outside the door with their swords in their hands. I didn't want to engage with them, so I simply snapped my fingers and cast a first circle spell [Sleep] to put them to one.

Since it wasn't a system-registered skill, the mana it took was enormous, but it was not a problem, especially now that I could restore mana after the state of completion had ended. I didn't wait for someone to find them outside like this and blame it on me, so I simply opened the next door to the lady's room and tossed both of them inside.

Once done, and not witnessed by anyone, I quickly left the residence as permitted by my employer. While I did want to go to the forest, I wanted to inform those at the house first.

When I arrived, to my surprise, I found Rayla cleaning the floor on all fours. Even when we had moved to the bigger house, we still hadn't hired a servant since Rayla was used to doing the housework and didn't want to waste money, even though we could afford one now.

But that part didn't surprise me the most. She always scrubbed the floor on her knees and hands. What surprised me was the lack of clothes on her. She wasn't wearing anything, from head to toe, completely naked.

Damn, I had already used up today's count.

Well, anyway. I still approached Rayla to have some hand fun and touched her bare, wiggling ass.

"Oh!" Rayla yelped in surprise, but she soon calmed down once she turned to see who was molesting her.

"You're home?" Rayla asked.

"Yes. But I have to go to the forest soon." I replied as I inserted a finger in Rayla's warm pussy.

"Aahh~~"

She moaned slightly at the intrusion but didn't let that distract from her housework. She kept cleaning the floor with the rug while I played with her pussy.

"Why?" She asked with a slightly deeper voice that was very sensual to my ears.

"I want to train a bit. I will return before tomorrow morning." I replied while I added another finger, making Rayla moan out loud.

Looking at her slightly quivering asshole, she seemed to have learned how to access those veins, albeit very slightly, or she could be doing that on instinct as well; no one could tell.

The point was, I had been pushing Rayla's anal forward again and again. Even last night, when I wanted to enter her pink quivering asshole, her pussy felt too good to let go, so I left it be for another time.

But now, I took a solemn vow to ravage her asshole once I returned from killing the lord tonight. As for Zara, I would see what to do with her.

And with that, I retracted my fingers from Rayla's pussy, which refused to let me go with the warmth she provided. Still, work had to be done.

But I was curious about one thing...

"Why are you naked, mother?" I couldn't help but ask.

"It's hot today, Jack. I thought about following your advice and working naked today." Rayla stood up, and as she did, her legs trembled a little. Still, she managed to collect herself and replied.

"Is that so?" I asked as I slapped her giant tits lightly, one after another.

"Hn!" Rayla grunted in slight pain and pleasure, but she was past the point of complaining. Now she was enslaved to this kind of pleasure play.

"Well, I will leave you to it and get ready to leave," I replied as I slapped her ass lightly, making her moan again before I left to get the job done.

I could only hope they would move tonight to finish the job.
